creator: knyght@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Thanks for this.

I've had a word with one of the devs. From the info you've given he
isn't sure if it's a problem with DOSBox or with clang.

Can you reply with the patch you made (even if it breaks things) and
the relevant compiler output?
I'm concerned that disabling optimisation (even if only for clang) is
not the right way to fix this for such a resource-hungry program.

Thanks,
Tom
